prompt: Create a warm, photorealistic product display of exactly 15 acrylic keychain charms featuring the same original chibi anime cat-eared girl character, an original black-haired catgirl, arranged neatly on a rectangular wooden tray. The character has long dark brown to black twin-tail hair, black cat ears, soft red-brown eyes, a tiny cute face, and wears an ornate red-and-black floral kimono with gold accents. Each charm is a transparent cut acrylic standee with a scalloped clear border and a small silver or clear keyring loop at the top, glossy reflections, and slight thickness visible along the edges. Count and show exactly 15 distinct charms: 1 top-left seated charm with cherry blossoms, 2 top-row standing charm framed by pale blossoms, 3 top-row seated charm with hands near knees, 4 top-row charm with a red paper umbrella behind her, 5 top-right charm holding a small lantern-like accessory, 6 middle-left charm with a large red umbrella background, 7 middle-left kneeling charm with blossoms, 8 middle-center charm with a pale golden moon disk behind her, 9 middle-right front-facing seated charm with blossom cluster, 10 middle-far-right seated charm with pink blossoms, 11 bottom-left shy seated charm surrounded by blossoms, 12 bottom-left-center front-facing charm with long hair spread out, 13 bottom-center charm with blossoms behind the head, 14 bottom-right-center charm with a pale moon disk and one leg visible, 15 bottom-right charm seated in front of cherry blossoms. Place them in a tidy 3-row grid across the tray, with natural small spacing and slight perspective from an overhead three-quarter angle. Surround the tray with pink cherry blossom flowers and scattered petals, a partially visible red Japanese-style paper umbrella or fan at the lower left, and a softly glowing wooden lantern or shoji-style light box in the upper right. Use a cozy traditional Japanese spring atmosphere, warm amber lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic wood grain, soft bokeh, delicate highlights on the acrylic surfaces, highly detailed miniature printing, and a premium handmade merch photography aesthetic. No text, no watermark, no hands, no packaging, and no extra charms beyond the exact 15.
